title: Hitting Connected Board Limits on your Dashboards? Our new app can help with that

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday community!

Are you handling multiple projects and working across different boards? Tired of connecting boards to another dashboard? Data located everywhere in your monday Workspaces in disconnected silos?

Our new App Master Data lets you sync items from any number of Boards to a Master Board!

  • Use 1 Chart View in your Master Board to gain a full view of your all your Projects on your monday.com Account, rather than using multiple Dashboards
  • Easy mapping, just select your Master Board and click save (If your columns have the same name and type, then they will auto populate in the Master Data board view)
  • Items in the Source Board will be synced to the Master Board
  • Items and Sub-items can be routed to different Master Boards e.g. Tasks (item), and Timelogs (sub-item)
  • Keep record of your deleted, and archived items for long term reporting

To use Master Data, create these essential columns on your Master Board. Then simply install our dedicated recipes on your Master Board(s) and Source Boards and configure the data mapping in the App view on each Source Board.

Our app can be used across monday products, whether it be work management, CRM, dev, or services, regardless of plan purchased. Usage of our app starts at $10 per month on a yearly plan, or $15 on monthly, which you can upgrade depending on your needs.

We created Master Data because reporting in monday is difficult once you start reaching connected board limits on Dashboards, and data is removed from charts when archiving, or deleted items.

Start your free 14 day trial here → Master Data - monday.com App Marketplace

Book in for a demo here → https://calendar.app.google/UDTXPLDwYWq46pSH6

Mint Consulting Australia is a monday.com silver partner. Learn more about us here: monday.com - Mint Consulting
